HPCell 0.5.0
  • Reference

    Compute Pathway-Level Communication Probabilities

    computeCommunProbPathway.Rd

    Aggregates ligand-receptor level communication probabilities into pathway-level probabilities for a CellChat object.

    computeCommunProbPathway(
  object = NULL,
  net = NULL,
  pairLR.use = NULL,
  thresh = 0.05
)

    Arguments

    object

    A CellChat object. If net and pairLR.use are not provided, they are extracted from this object.

    net

    A list with slots $prob (3-D array of probabilities) and $pval (3-D array of p-values). NULL reads from object@net.

    pairLR.use

    A data frame of significant ligand-receptor pairs with a pathway_name column. NULL reads from object@LR$LRsig.

    thresh

    Numeric significance threshold; interactions with p-value above this value are set to zero. Default: 0.05.

    Value

    A list containing prob (pathway probability array) and pathways.sig (names of significant pathways).

    Contents

    Developed by Stefano Mangiola, Jiayi Si.
